title: Frontline Features. Design, Technology and Social Research in Times of War and Repression
content:
Conference, 17 June 2026, Campus Condorcet (Paris-Aubervilliers) and online.

L’article Frontline Features. Design, Technology and Social Research in Times of War and Repression est apparu en premier sur Center for Internet and Society.
